name: Execution of Exfiltration and Tunneling Tools
notes:
This is rule detects execution of exfiltration and tunneling tools.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Exfiltration and Tunneling Tools Execution
SIGMA Description: Execution of well known tools for data exfiltration and tunneling


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('plink.exe', 'socat.exe', 'stunnel.exe', 'httptunnel.exe') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Execution of Exfiltration and Tunneling Tools on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('plink.exe', 'socat.exe', 'stunnel.exe', 'httptunnel.exe') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Execution of Exfiltration and Tunneling Tools
Event description: Detects execution of exfiltration and tunneling tools.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
